svg.title: Vee Vee Architecture v2 — Payments Intelligence Agent
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the two-path pipeline: weekly digest (Saturday 22:00 UTC) and breaking news alert (Mon/Wed/Fri 01:00 UTC), flowing through Fetch, Classify+Rank, Summarise, Roundup, Send stages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions weekly trigger work?')
g.text: GitHub Actions · Sat 22:00 UTC → Sun 06:00 SGT

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the breaking news trigger schedule work?')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage 1 Fetch in Vee Vee in more detail')
g.text: Layer 1 filter: drops events, promo, interviews

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Stage 2 Classify and Rank in Vee Vee in more detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage 3 Summarise in Vee Vee in more detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage 4 Roundup in Vee Vee in more detail')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage 5 Send in Vee Vee in more detail')
g.text: First msg pinned · 2s delay between msgs
Stories marked seen · DB committed [skip ci]

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Breaking News Alert path in Vee Vee in more detail')
